content: Subscribe to updates We’re currently experiencing issues ChatGPT Elevated failures for some users joining ChatGPT Enterprise and ChatGPT Edu workspaces via SSO. We are investigating elevated failures for some users joining ChatGPT Enterprise and ChatGPT Edu workspaces via SSO. Affected users may see an authentication error during signup including registration_disallowed, after completing their organization’s SSO flow.
